summary: Complete testing of FitMaxPro Weekly Motivation Emails feature - All 10 backend API tests passed, Frontend Admin 'Motivation Emails' tab fully verified
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/admin/weekly-email-settings - Returns default settings structure (enabled, send_day, include_running_stats, include_workout_stats, include_points_earned, include_leaderboard_position)
Backend: PUT /api/admin/weekly-email-settings - Updates and persists settings correctly
Backend: PUT /api/admin/weekly-email-settings - Can disable emails and modify individual options
Backend: GET /api/user/weekly-stats - Returns weekly stats (running, workouts, points, leaderboard position)
Backend: GET /api/user/weekly-stats - Requires authentication (401 without auth)
Backend: POST /api/admin/send-weekly-emails - Sends weekly emails (stores in pending_emails if RESEND_API_KEY not configured)
Backend: POST /api/admin/send-weekly-emails - Requires VIP admin access (401 without auth)
Backend: GET /api/admin/email-history - Returns batches list and pending_count
Backend: GET /api/admin/email-history - Requires VIP admin access (401 without auth)
Backend: GET/PUT /api/admin/weekly-email-settings - Both require VIP admin authentication
Frontend: 'Send emails' button is GREEN and functional
Frontend: Email Settings section with 4 checkboxes (Running Stats, Workout Stats, Points Earned, Leaderboard Position)
Frontend: Custom intro message inputs for French and English
Frontend: Email Preview section showing email template with FITMAXPRO branding
Frontend: Send History section showing email batch history
seed_data_creation: Session token created for VIP test user via MongoDB
context_for_next_testing_agent: Weekly Motivation Emails feature fully implemented and tested. Backend APIs: GET/PUT /api/admin/weekly-email-settings, POST /api/admin/send-weekly-emails, GET /api/admin/email-history, GET /api/user/weekly-stats all working. Frontend Admin tab 'Motivation Emails' has all required UI elements: green Send button, 4 configuration checkboxes, custom message inputs FR/EN, email preview, and send history section.

mocked_apis.Resend Email: POST /api/admin/send-weekly-emails stores emails in pending_emails collection if RESEND_API_KEY is not properly configured. When RESEND_API_KEY is present, emails are sent via Resend API.

weekly_stats_api.GET /api/user/weekly-stats: YES - Returns running stats, workout stats, points earned, and leaderboard position for the week

weekly_email_settings.GET /api/admin/weekly-email-settings: YES - Returns settings with enabled, send_day, include_running_stats, include_workout_stats, include_points_earned, include_leaderboard_position, custom_intro_fr, custom_intro_en
weekly_email_settings.PUT /api/admin/weekly-email-settings: YES - Updates and persists settings correctly

send_weekly_emails.POST /api/admin/send-weekly-emails: YES - Sends motivation emails to all active subscribers (MOCKED: stores in pending_emails if Resend API key not configured)

email_history.GET /api/admin/email-history: YES - Returns batches list and pending_count

frontend_admin_tab.Custom message FR input: YES - Input field present with placeholder
frontend_admin_tab.Custom message EN input: YES - Input field present with placeholder
frontend_admin_tab.Email Preview section: YES - Shows FITMAXPRO email template with branding
frontend_admin_tab.Send History section: YES - Shows email batch history with dates and counts
